export.Chinese:
用法：export [选项] [变量名[=值]]
功能：定义环境变量并导出至当前会话，使后续子进程可继承该变量，完全对齐BASH语法
核心选项：
  -p  静默返回，仅执行变量导出逻辑，无任何控制台输出
使用规则：
  1. 支持变量展开，$VAR或${VAR}格式可引用已定义的环境/会话变量
  2. 单引号包裹值时原样保留，双引号包裹值时自动展开内部变量
  3. 支持${VAR:-默认值}格式，变量未定义时使用指定默认值
  4. 仅输入export 变量名时，导出已存在的变量至环境
示例：
  export PATH=/usr/local/bin:$PATH 追加路径到环境变量
  export NAME='test' 定义字符串变量（单引号不展开）
  export DESC="name: $NAME" 定义变量并展开内部引用
  export TMP=${TMP:-/tmp} 变量未定义时使用默认值/tmp
  export -p PATH 静默导出PATH变量
export.English:
Usage: export [options] [VARNAME[=VALUE]]
Function: Define environment variables and export them to the current session, making them inheritable by subsequent child processes, fully aligned with BASH syntax
Core options:
  -p  Silent return, only execute variable export logic with no console output
Usage rules:
  1. Support variable expansion, $VAR or ${VAR} format can reference defined environment/session variables
  2. Values wrapped in single quotes are retained as-is, values wrapped in double quotes expand internal variables automatically
  3. Support ${VAR:-default} format, use the specified default value when the variable is undefined
  4. Entering export VARNAME only exports the existing variable to the environment
Examples:
  export PATH=/usr/local/bin:$PATH Append path to environment variable
  export NAME='test' Define string variable (no expansion in single quotes)
  export DESC="name: $NAME" Define variable and expand internal references
  export TMP=${TMP:-/tmp} Use default value /tmp when the variable is undefined
  export -p PATH Export PATH variable silently
